title: Andy Baxter practicing a book!
text:
Preface
This is a Quarto book.
To learn more about Quarto books visit https://quarto.org/docs/books. See (Craig et al. 2017).

1 + 1

[1] 2






Craig, Peter, Srinivasa Vittal Katikireddi, Alastair Leyland, and Frank Popham. 2017. “Natural Experiments: An Overview of Methods, Approaches, and Contributions to Public Health Intervention Research.” Annual Review of Public Health 38 (1): 39–56. https://doi.org/10.1146/annurev-publhealth-031816-044327.

title: 1  Introduction
text:
This is a book created from markdown and executable code.
See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming. Lots of options exist (Baxter 2019).

1 + 1

[1] 2






Baxter, Andrew J. 2019. Andrewbaxter439/ITS_shinyapp: Updated Version. https://dx.doi.org/10.5281/ZENODO.3519394.


Knuth, Donald E. 1984. “Literate Programming.” Comput. J. (USA) 27 (2): 97–111. https://doi.org/10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97.

title: 2  Summary
text:
In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.
